uplink.description: Sensor data: 22.5 C, 60.0% RH, battery 88%, heartbeat
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected.data authored from the upstream reference decode (temperature/humidity = signed 16-bit big-endian /10; battery byte = percent), normalized to vocabulary keys.

uplink.description: Sensor data: -5.0 C, 33.0% RH, battery 47%, temperature_low + humidity_low
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input exercising negative two's-complement temperature (0xFFCE = -50 -> -5.0 C) and a multi-bit event bitmask (0x28); expected.data from the upstream reference decode normalized to vocabulary keys.
Synthetic in-bounds input; firmwareVersion string formatted exactly as the upstream reference (major.minor(2)-padded.build(3)-padded); no vocabulary mapping, emitted as camelCase extra.

uplink.description: Device settings: data upload interval = 30 min (fPort 12)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; dataUploadInterval = signed 16-bit big-endian from the upstream reference decode; no vocabulary mapping, emitted as camelCase extra.

uplink.description: Threshold settings: high temp 45, low temp 5, high RH 90, low RH 30 (fPort 13)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; threshold fields from the upstream reference decode (temperatures signed 16-bit big-endian, humidities single bytes); no vocabulary mapping, emitted as camelCase extras.

uplink.description: Sensor data with unknown sensor type byte (fPort 10, bytes[0] != 1)
uplink._note: Synthetic error input; upstream returns 'unknown sensor type' when the fPort 10 sensor-type byte is not 1.
Synthetic error input; upstream returns 'unknown FPort' for any fPort other than 8, 10, 12, 13.
